params.expected_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다

notes: v4 envelope: h2_end_stream=0 (never close stream) to prevent invalidateAll() wipe. #505 DevTools diagnosis confirmed root cause: HF frontend calls invalidateAll() in finally block after stream ends, which fetches empty conversation from server and wipes UI. v4 removes [DONE] and status:finished, keeps stream open so for-await loop never exits. Expected: warning text stays visible in chat bubble, input may remain locked (acceptable).
